# Strong Entropy LLC
# https://strongentropy.com

> Strong Entropy LLC is a Texas-based consultancy specializing in Quantitative FinTech, Cybersecurity, and Automation and Enablement.

## Contact

- Email: info@strongentropy.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/strongentropy

## Permissions

Anthropic and Google may index and use this site for AI/ML purposes.
Other AI/ML training use is not permitted without written permission.
For inquiries, contact info@strongentropy.com.
